placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, 1, S, S] after expanding [B, 1, 1, S] mask along query dim
placement_observations.source: call_site: sdpa_mask = ttnn.expand(sdpa_mask, [-1, -1, seq_len, -1]); score_memcfg = cfg.score_memcfg or ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG; sdpa_mask = ttnn.to_memory_config(sdpa_mask, score_memcfg)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, num_heads, query_seq_len, S] after expanding [B, 1, 1, S]
placement_observations.source: call_site: expanded_mask = ttnn.expand(pad_mask, [-1, num_heads, query_seq_len, -1]); if expanded_mask.memory_config() != attention_scores.memory_config(): to_memory_config(expanded_mask, target_memcfg)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, 1, S, S] expanded from [B, 1, 1, S]; downstream cloned to bfloat4_b
placement_observations.source: call_site: attention_mask = ttnn.expand(attention_mask, [-1, -1, seq_len, -1]); ttnn.tril(...); ttnn.clone(attention_mask, dtype=ttnn.bfloat4_b) (qwen2_5_vl causal mask construction)

placement_observations.tensor_role: output (pad embedding tiles for prefill padding)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: [prefill_seq_len - actual_prompt_len, hidden_dim], expanded from a single pad embedding row
placement_observations.source: call_site: input_padding = ttnn.expand(pad_embedding, (prefill_seq_len - actual_prompt_len, -1)) guarded by 'if prefill_seq_len - actual_prompt_len > 0'
